label: Sample

ui.search_query: SELECT j.id, j.job_title, j.equipment, j.status, j.description, j.created_at, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM job_card_keerthanaa j LEFT JOIN customer_form_keerthanaa c ON j.customer_id = c.id WHERE (COALESCE(j.job_title, '') ILIKE '%search_term%' OR COALESCE(j.equipment, '') ILIKE '%search_term%' OR COALESCE(j.status, '') ILIKE '%search_term%' OR COALESCE(c.first_name, '') ILIKE '%search_term%' OR COALESCE(c.last_name, '') ILIKE '%search_term%') ORDER BY j.id DESC

data.jobs_list: SELECT j.id, j.job_title, j.equipment, j.status, j.description, j.created_at, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM job_card_keerthanaa j LEFT JOIN customer_form_keerthanaa c ON j.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY j.id DESC

1.query: INSERT INTO customer_form_keerthanaa (first_name, last_name, email, address) VALUES ('{{input_data.first_name_input.[index]}}','{{input_data.last_name_input.[index]}}','{{input_data.email_input.[index]}}','{{input_data.address_input.[index]}}')

ui.search_hint: Search by name, email or address...
ui.search_query: SELECT * FROM customer_form_keerthanaa WHERE (COALESCE(first_name, '') ILIKE '%search_term%' OR COALESCE(last_name, '') ILIKE '%search_term%' OR COALESCE(email, '') ILIKE '%search_term%' OR COALESCE(address, '') ILIKE '%search_term%') ORDER BY id DESC

data.customers_list: SELECT id, first_name, last_name, email, address FROM customer_form_keerthanaa

data.jobs_count: SELECT COUNT(*) as total FROM job_card_keerthanaa WHERE customer_id = {{arguments.customer_id}}
data.customer_jobs: SELECT * FROM job_card_keerthanaa WHERE customer_id = {{arguments.customer_id}} ORDER BY id DESC

data.job: SELECT j.*, c.first_name, c.last_name FROM job_card_keerthanaa j LEFT JOIN customer_form_keerthanaa c ON j.customer_id = c.id WHERE j.id = {{arguments.job_id}}

description: A new app created with the app builder
